category_sources: source_facts.description says it provisions and deploys WordPress applications to DigitalOcean; official Sail homepage describes provisioning servers, deploy/rollback, backups, domains, and SSL.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README headline and homepage use the product name Sail.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points to the Sail Knowledgebase for complete documentation; official install page is part of sailed.io Knowledgebase.
repo_sources: Official Sail install documentation says to download source files from GitHub with git clone git@github.com:kovshenin/sail.git; GitHub repo README identifies Sail and links to sailed.io.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a CLI for WordPress on DigitalOcean; official GitHub topics include wordpress, digitalocean, wordpress-development, and hosting.
